panels.title: Mux latency over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT greptime_timestamp AS time, CONCAT(plane, ' ', method, ' ', path, ' ', status) AS metric, duration_ms FROM anvil_request_mux ORDER BY greptime_timestamp

panels.description: Outer public listener dispatch latency before/through gRPC or S3 routing.

panels.title: Request-correlated CoreStore calls

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_id, mux_request_id, plane, method, path, operation, duration_ms FROM anvil_core_store_op WHERE request_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY greptime_timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

panels.description: Correlates public/admin request IDs with CoreStore calls made while serving the request.

panels.title: Request-correlated file I/O

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_id, mux_request_id, plane, method, path, component, operation, bytes, duration_ms, file_path FROM anvil_file_io WHERE request_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY greptime_timestamp DESC LIMIT 300

panels.description: Correlates public/admin request IDs with disk operations beneath that request.

panels.title: fsync/sync_all latency over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT greptime_timestamp AS time, file_path AS metric, duration_ms FROM anvil_file_io WHERE operation = 'sync_all' ORDER BY greptime_timestamp

panels.description: Each CoreStore atomic write calls sync_all on the temp file before rename. This panel isolates those waits.

targets.rawSql: SELECT component, operation, COUNT(*) AS calls, SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes, AVG(bytes) AS avg_bytes, MAX(bytes) AS max_bytes FROM anvil_file_io GROUP BY component, operation ORDER BY total_bytes DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT greptime_timestamp, request_id, component, operation, duration_ms, bytes, file_path FROM anvil_file_io ORDER BY duration_ms DESC LIMIT 100
